tasks.title: Delete music-analysis package and harmony-analysis skill
acceptance_criteria: skills README no longer lists music-harmony-analysis.
done_definition: No deleted package files remain in the working tree.

tasks.title: Remove code and config references to music-analysis
acceptance_criteria: Songs data no longer imports or includes the audio-derived Risk It All entry.
AGENTS no longer routes tasks to the removed music-analysis package or skill.
done_definition: Repository search shows no active code/config references to packages/music-analysis or skills/music-harmony-analysis.

tasks.title: Delete music-analysis docs and run artifacts
done_definition: Known music-analysis docs and runs are absent.

tasks.title: Verify the app after removal
acceptance_criteria: Lint passes or only unrelated pre-existing warnings remain.
Typecheck no longer fails because of the deleted music-analysis package.
done_definition: Verification output is recorded in the run artifacts.

assumptions: The request intentionally covers uncommitted music-analysis work and related artifacts.
General Songs UI should remain, but audio-derived Risk It All seed data should be removed because it depends on music-analysis output.
Lead-sheet terminology that is part of the general Songs UI may remain unless it is specifically tied to music-analysis.
risks: Some older run artifacts may mention lead-sheet workflows not strictly named music-analysis; removal is limited to clearly related music-analysis and harmony-analysis artifacts.
The repository has unrelated uncommitted changes and main is behind origin/main, so automatic pull remains unsafe.
